code:
stateDiagram state "This is a state description of HR600 Workflow" as s2 [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> Login Login --> if_backupData if_backupData --> StartWorkflow: false if_backupData --> is_networkAvailable : true is_networkAvailable --> BackupToNetwork: true Note right of BackupToNetwork: There is still unsaved production data in the backup directory.
Do you want to transfer the data to the network drive now? is_networkAvailable --> RemainingBackup: false Note right of RemainingBackup: There is production data in the backup directory that has not yet been backed up.
The network drive for backing up the data is not available.
The data cannot be transferred. StartWorkflow --> FinishWorkflow FinishWorkflow --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] StartWorkflow --> MesDataToNetwork MesDataToNetwork --> StartWorkflow MesDataToNetwork --> Crash Note right of Crash: The transfer of the packed production data export file failed.
The data will be saved to a local backup directory.
Please make sure that the network drive is available and access is granted.
You can move the cached data to the network drive again the next time you start HRSoft2. Note right of Crash: The backup of the packed production data export file to the backup directory failed.
Please make sure that the backup directory is available and access is granted.
You may find the production data unpacked on the temporary directory TempArchiveFiles.
You can also initiate a manual export from the HRSoft2 archives.
If the problem persists, please contact Ersa service. Note right of Crash: An error occurred while generating the zip file of the production data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while generating the CSV data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just created.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while querying the database for the last entry.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. MesDataToNetwork --> FinishWorkflow [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] Crash --> FinishWorkflow Crash --> Backup [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HR600工作流创建一个状态图。这个系统涉及MQTT Broker、遥测数据流和执行器控制器三个外部IoT组件。用户登录后要先检查是否需要备份数据。
明白了。所以流程是：从MQTT Broker进入Login状态，然后到if_backupData判断节点。如果不需要备份就直接StartWorkflow，需要备份的话还要再判断网络是否可用？
对，网络可用时走BackupToNetwork，不可用则进入RemainingBackup状态。这两个状态都需要给用户显示提示信息，说明备份目录中还有未保存的生产数据。
好的，我已经添加了这两个分支和对应的注释。现在StartWorkflow之后应该连接到FinishWorkflow，然后输出到TelemetryStream。另外StartWorkflow还要并行触发MesDataToNetwork来处理MES数据，对吗？
是的，但MesDataToNetwork有个特殊逻辑：成功的话返回StartWorkflow继续循环，失败的话会进入Crash状态。Crash之后可以走到FinishWorkflow结束，也可以进入Backup状态做本地备份。
Crash状态看起来有很多错误场景需要注释。我注意到有CSV生成错误、数据库查询错误、ZIP文件生成错误，还有备份目录写入失败和网络传输失败这几种情况，都需要在Crash旁边标注吗？
没错，这些错误场景都要列出来。另外别忘了IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController要作为独立节点放在图上，它虽然不直接参与状态流转，但是系统架构的一部分。
已完成。最后确认一下整体结构：顶部有标题状态s2，左侧MQTT Broker入口，右侧TelemetryStream出口，底部ActuatorController独立放置，中间是完整的登录-备份-工作流-异常处理逻辑。
